note: Local extension schema for hook declarations. Mirrors Q00/ouroboros-plugins/schemas/0.1/ plus optional top-level hooks while preserving the archived 0.1 contract.

plugin.schema.json: Changed $id/title/schema_version const from 0.1 to a local 0.2 schema and added optional top-level hooks declarations. Hook execution/dispatch is intentionally out of scope.
audit-event.schema.json: Vendored audit-event.schema.json with local 0.2 $id/title/schema_version alignment; audit event shape remains otherwise unchanged from 0.1.
